Leenhouts, PW. 1982. Loganiaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 9: 567-568

genera.last_edited: Last edited by P.B. Pelser, 5 November 2025

species.citation: Lour. , Fl. Cochinch. (1790) 72 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 367; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 316; Leenh., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1962) 336.
species.distribution: India to China and Taiwan, Malesia, Pacific Ocean, Pakistan. BATAN, BOHOL, CALAYAN, CEBU, LUBANG, LUZON: Albay, Apayao (photos), Aurora, Benguet, Cagayan (photos), Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, La Union, Laguna, Mountain Province, NCR, Nueva Vizcaya, Pampanga, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, Misamis Oriental (photos), South Cotabato, Zamboanga del Norte, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY.
species.notes: Luzon to Palawan and Mindanao. In thickets, recent slides, open places, etc. 0-3000m.
